steps: Go to https://dev.gusto.com/ and sign up for a Gusto developer account
Accept the developer terms of service and complete account setup
Create an Organization in the developer portal
Click 'Create Application' and fill in the application name and redirect URI
After creation, copy the 'Client ID' from the application details page
Copy the 'Client Secret' — store it securely
Use the demo environment (https://api.gusto-demo.com) for testing with a demo company

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your Gusto OAuth application's Client ID from the developer portal

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Gusto OAuth application's Client Secret from the developer portal

notes: Developer accounts are free; production access requires Gusto partnership approval
A demo environment is available at https://api.gusto-demo.com for testing without real data
Demo companies with pre-populated employees and payrolls are auto-generated for testing
Wildcard redirect URIs and fragment URIs (#) are not supported

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the current user's info to verify the OAuth token is valid
